_publications._publicationTitle: Cyclic AMP suppression is sufficient to induce gliomagenesis in a mouse model of neurofibromatosis-1.

_contextSnippet: The presence of a functional paracrine relationship between CXCL12-expressing stromal elements and tumor cells is demonstrated by the frequent presence of the CXCL12 receptor, CXCR4, in a CXCL12-induced phosphorylated form within bipolar pilocytic cells (Figure 1B, inset).
details: Successfully detected CXCL12-induced phosphorylated form of CXCR4 within bipolar pilocytic cells, demonstrating functional paracrine relationship
